---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What were you trying to do?
Describe what topic you were learning and what you expected to happen.

## What actually happened?
Describe what the AI did (or didn't do) instead.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the workspace in Cursor/Claude Code
2. Type: `Teach me [topic]`
3. ... (what happened next?)

## Relevant Files
If possible, paste the contents of:
- `MISSION.md`
- `LEARNER-PROFILE.md`
- The lesson or learning record that had the issue

## Environment
- AI used: [Cursor / Claude Code / Other]
- OS: [Windows / Mac / Linux]
- Any other relevant details

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots of the chat or lesson output.
